zh.lifeSummary: 當Konrad Rehm於1369年出生在德國爾特波格尼爾廷根時，他的父親Johann Rehm29歲，母親Catharina Bach19歲。他於1401年與Barbara Besserer在德國爾特波格尼爾廷根結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1438年1月28日在他的家鄉享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Konrad Rehm于1369年出生在德国爾特波格尼爾廷根时，他的父亲Johann Rehm29岁，母亲Catharina Bach19岁。他于1401年与Barbara Besserer在德国爾特波格尼爾廷根结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1438年1月28日在他的家乡享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rehm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Bernd, Otto, Armin, Hans, Gunter, Hermann, Lothar, Oskar.
German: from the medieval personal name Rehm (see Remy ).
German: from Middle High German reme ‘frame, loom, rack’, hence a metonymic occupational name for someone who made or used such items.

variants.name: Rahm
meanings: German:

topographic name from Middle High German, Middle Low German rām(e) ‘end, target, mark’, or a habitational name from any of several places in Westphalia and Rhineland named with this word. This surname (in any of the possible senses; see also below) is also found in France (Alsace).
from Middle High German, Middle Low German rām ‘soot’, possibly a metonymic occupational name for a blacksmith or charcoal burner, or a nickname for a dirty person.

variants.name: Rohm
meanings: German:
from the ancient Germanic personal name Ruom (Old High German hruom ‘fame’), a short form of Ruombald and similar personal names containing this element.
(Röhm): variant of Rehm . Compare Roehm .

variants.name: Rhem
meanings: Americanized form of German Rehm or its variant Remm. This surname is found mainly among African Americans.

History: The progenitor of many of the Rhems was Melcher Rhem (or, as spelled in the surviving documents, Remm) from Germany, who died in 1768 in Craven County, NC. He had three sons, all surnamed Rhem.

variants.name: Remy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Andre, Jean-Claude, Evens, Germaine, Gisele, Henri, Hugues, Jacques, Jean Raymond, Jean-Daniel, Josee, Laurent.

French (Rémy); West Indian (in Haiti, Martinique, and Guadeloupe Rémy); Walloon and German: from a French personal name which represents a falling together of two distinct Latin names: Remigius (a derivative of remex, genitive remigis ‘rower, oarsman’), and Remedius (from remedium ‘cure, remedy’). The former name was borne by a 6th-century bishop of Rheims; the latter was borne by various other Christian saints of the 8th to 10th centuries. Compare Ramey , Reamy , and Rhamy .

History: The surname Rémy of French origin is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors, once along with its altered forms Ramey and Remey, and once along with the variant de Rémi and altered forms Reamy and Remey. It is also listed in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America. One of Huguenot ancestors was Jacques Rémy, born c. 1630 in France, who by 1672 lived in Westmoreland County, VA, where he died in 1721. Many of his descendants bear the surname Ramey , some also Rhamy . — Léopold Rémy dit Bellefleur from Biécourt in the Vosges married Marie-Angélique Trudel in L'Ange-Gardien, QC, in 1758.

variants.name: Roehm
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Klaus, Eberhard, Gerhard.
German (Röhm): variant of Rehm . Compare Rohm 2.

variants.name: Rem
meanings: German: perhaps an altered form of   Rehm  .
American shortened form of Polish Rembowski: unexplained.
Dutch: from the personal name Rem, a short form of Remmert or Rembert .

variants.name: Rehmann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt.
North German: topographic name for someone who lived in a marshy place, from Middle Low German red ‘bog’ + man ‘man’.
North German: variant of Rehm 2, with the addition of Middle Low German man ‘man’.

nameMeanings.name: Konrad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from kuon ‘bold’ + rad ‘counsel’.

en.lifeSummary: When Konrad Rehm was born in 1369, in Nürtingen, Württemberg, Germany, his father, Johann Rehm, was 29 and his mother, Catharina Bach, was 19. He married Barbara Besserer in 1401, in Nürtingen, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 28 January 1438, in his hometown, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Konrad Rehm est né en 1369, à Nürtingen, Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Johann Rehm, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Catharina Bach, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Barbara Besserer en 1401, à Nürtingen, Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 28 janvier 1438, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Konrad Rehm 1369 in Nürtingen, Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Johann Rehm 29 und seine Mutter Catharina Bach 19. Er hat 1401 in Nürtingen, Württemberg, Deutschland Barbara Besserer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. Januar 1438 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Konrad Rehm è nato il nel 1369 nel Nürtingen, Württemberg, Germania, il suo padre, Johann Rehm, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Catharina Bach, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Barbara Besserer nel 1401, nel Nürtingen, Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 gennaio 1438, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Konrad Rehmが1369年にドイツウuルッテンバーグンuルティンジェンで生まれた時，父Johann Rehmは29歳，母Catharina Bachは19歳であった。1401年にドイツウuルッテンバーグンuルティンジェンでBarbara Bessererと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1438年1月28日に故郷で69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Konrad Rehm(이)가 1369년 독일 wu르테버그 u르틴겐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johann Rehm(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Catharina Bach(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1401년 독일 wu르테버그 u르틴겐에서 Barbara Besserer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1438년 1월 28일 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Konrad Rehm nasceu em 1369, em Nürtingen, Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Johann Rehm, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Catharina Bach, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Barbara Besserer em 1401, em Nürtingen, Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 28 de janeiro de 1438, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Konrad Rehm родился в 1369 г. в местности нuртинген, вuрттембирг, Германия, его отцу по имени Johann Rehm было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Catharina Bach, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Barbara Besserer в 1401 г. в местности нuртинген, вuрттембирг, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 28 января 1438 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Konrad Rehm nació en 1369, en Nürtingen, Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Johann Rehm, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Catharina Bach, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Barbara Besserer en 1401, en Nürtingen, Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de enero de 1438, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años.
